jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at AIIMS - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!
